---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help improve Void Notes
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: brutal-build
---

**Description**
A clear description of what the bug is.

**Steps to Reproduce**
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

**Expected Behavior**
What you expected to happen.

**Actual Behavior**
What actually happened.

**Screenshots**
If applicable, drag and drop screenshots here.

**Environment:**
 - OS: [e.g. Windows 11, Windows 10]
 - Void Notes Version: [e.g. v0.3.0]
 - Theme: [e.g. macOS Glass, Obsidian]

**Additional Context**
Any other relevant information.
